professionalSummary: Software engineer with 8 years of experience in designing, developing, and maintaining scalable web applications.
Strong background in backend development, API design, database systems, and cloud-based solutions.
Experienced in collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable software products on time.
Focused on writing clean, maintainable code and improving application performance and stability.
currentResponsibilities: Designing and developing backend services for enterprise applications.
Building and maintaining RESTful APIs for internal and external consumers.
Optimizing database queries and improving application performance.
Collaborating with product, QA, and DevOps teams to deliver production-ready releases.
Reviewing code and guiding junior developers on best practices.

responsibilities: Developed scalable backend services using Java and Spring Boot.
Implemented secure authentication and authorization flows.
Improved API response times through caching and query optimization.
Worked on cloud deployment and containerized applications.
achievements: Reduced API latency by improving service and database performance.
Delivered critical features for high-traffic business workflows.

responsibilities: Built and maintained enterprise web applications.
Integrated third-party services and internal APIs.
Worked closely with QA to resolve defects and improve product quality.
achievements: Contributed to successful delivery of multiple releases.
Improved code maintainability through refactoring and testing.

responsibilities: Assisted in developing application features and bug fixes.
Wrote unit tests and supported deployment activities.
Participated in code reviews and sprint planning.
achievements: Gained experience across the full software development lifecycle.

declaration.text: I hereby declare that the above information is true and correct to the best of my knowledge and belief.
